name: Vanilla-Almond Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour with baking powder.
2. Cream butter in a bowl until very light.
3. In a separate bowl, beat eggs with sugar until thick and light, then add to the butter.
4. Add almonds and flour, and mix well.
5. Blend in the milk and vanilla, and knead to make a fairly stiff dough.
6. Pinch off small pieces of the dough and shape them between the palms of your hands into flat rounds.
7. Place on a buttered sheet and bake in a preheated 300°F oven for about 15 minutes.
8. Cool and serve.
